== Jiro Toyato ♂ ==
An ace driver, a tofu maker, and a high school student. The name Jiro means speed!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Jiro Toyato, complete [[Yamato]] Key Clue "Greatest Racer." 

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 10 letters back and forth, Jiro Toyato will arrive at [[Home Base]] with the gift of {{RewardIconWithText|Handmade Tofu}}.

{{RewardIconWithText|Handmade Tofu}} contains:
* {{RewardIconWithText|Moldy Tofu}} (Snail RUSH +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +200}})
* {{RewardIconWithText|Fried Tofu}} (Snail DEF +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +200}})
* {{RewardIconWithText|Hard Tofu}} (Snail ATK +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +200}})
* {{RewardIconWithText|Soft Tofu}} (Snail HP +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +200}})

===★☆☆ > ★★☆===
After 10 letters back and forth, Jiro Toyato will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift Snepe's Urn (Master Alchemy Case, Soul of Snepe). This will also begin the [[Mailbox#Old Wizard|Old Wizard]] storyline.

===★★☆ > ★★★===
After 9 letters back and forth, Jiro Toyato will move in permanently with his minion, The Mechanic.

==Rent==
[[File:Jiro Toyato rent.png|frameless|left]]

Jiro Toyato rent is collected on '''Thursday''' and found as a tool box on the floor.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +10m}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Faraday's Dynamo|blue}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Engine 86|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Refinement Speedup!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★
|Refine Speedup +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|Refine Speedup +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|Refine Speedup +4h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Pumpkin Coach}}{{Relink|Pumpkin Coach}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Flyer I}}{{Relink|Flyer I}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Hawking's Wheelchair}}{{Relink|Hawking's Wheelchair}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Otto Engine}}{{Relink|Otto Engine}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Boat of St. Peter}}{{Relink|Boat of St. Peter}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Ship in a Bottle}}{{Relink|Ship in a Bottle}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Golden Chariot}}{{Relink|Golden Chariot}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Aladdin Carpet}}{{Relink|Aladdin Carpet}}
|}

==Jiro's Gutter Run==
Step on the gas when you drive past a gutter, then slam on the brake to drift out a beautiful curve...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FTH +5||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +30s
|-
|2||180||2k||FTH +10||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +1m30s 
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FTH +15||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +2m
|-
|4||200||8k||FTH +20||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +2m30s
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FTH +25||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +3m
|-
|6||220||18k||FTH +30||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +3m30s
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FTH +35||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +4m
|-
|8||240||32k||FTH +40||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +4m30s
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FTH +45||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +5m 
|-
|10||260||50k||FTH +50||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +5m30s
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FTH +55||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +6m
|-
|12||285||72k||FTH +60||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +6m30s 
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FTH +65||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +7m 
|-
|14||315||98k||FTH +70||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +7m30s
|-
|15||330||112k||FTH +75||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +8m
|-
|16||345||123k||FTH +80||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +8m30s
|-
|17||360||144k||FTH +85||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +9m
|-
|18||375||162k||FTH +90||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +9m30s 
|-
|19||390||180k||FTH +95||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +10m
|-
|20||400||200k||FTH +100||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +10m30s
|-
|21||420||220k||FTH +105||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +11m
|-
|22||440||242k||FTH +110||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +11m30s
|-
|23||460||264k||FTH +115||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +12m 
|-
|24||480||285k||FTH +120||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +12m30s 
|-
|25||500||309k||FTH +125||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +13m 
|-
|26||520||333k||FTH +130||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +13m30s
|-
|27||540||357k||FTH +135||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +14m
|-
|28||560||381k||FTH +140||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +14m30s 
|-
|29||580||405k||FTH +145||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +15m
|-
|30||600||429k||FTH +150||Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +15m30s
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Jiro's Gutter Run is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +10
|-
|2||4k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +30 
|-
|4||8k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +40 
|-
|5||10k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +60 
|-
|7||14k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +70 
|-
|8||16k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +80 
|-
|9||18k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +90 
|-
|10||20k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24||48k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||55k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||60k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||65k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||70k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||75k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Jiro Toyato specializes in '''Mecha Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mecha is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Mechanic==
During his escape, Jiro Toyato held all the mechanics who helped him repair his car in case they gave him away! These poor guys are now in big trouble.

=== Special Ability - Battle Mechanic===
Per 10 Mechanics in battle, Troop Regen +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Mechanics!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Divergence Meter}}<br>{{relink|Divergence Meter}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Tee Virus}}<br>{{relink|Tee Virus}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Edison's Phonograph}}<br>{{relink|Edison's Phonograph}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Yuan Calendar}}<br>{{relink|Yuan Calendar}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Babbage Engine}}<br>{{relink|Babbage Engine}}
|HP +4% 
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Watt Steam Engine}}<br>{{relink|Watt Steam Engine}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Aegis System}}<br>{{relink|Aegis System}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK  +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Voyager 1}}<br>{{relink|Voyager 1}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
